---
title: "Data, State, and Representation"
---

# Data, State, and Representation

Range: `0250-0371`.

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                | Summary                                                                                                   |
| ----- | ----------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 0250  | [address](#rune-0250)               | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0251  | [aggregate state](#rune-0251)       | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0252  | [array](#rune-0252)                 | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0253  | [bag](#rune-0253)                   | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0254  | [binary blob](#rune-0254)           | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0255  | [bit](#rune-0255)                   | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0256  | [bitmap](#rune-0256)                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0257  | [blob](#rune-0257)                  | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0258  | [block {Data}](#rune-0258)          | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0259  | [Bloom filter](#rune-0259)          | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0260  | [body](#rune-0260)                  | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0261  | [book-keeping field](#rune-0261)    | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0262  | [bucket {Data}](#rune-0262)         | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0263  | [buffer](#rune-0263)                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0264  | [byte](#rune-0264)                  | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0265  | [cache entry](#rune-0265)           | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0266  | [canonical form {Data}](#rune-0266) | A normalization word; many possible surfaces are forced into one agreed shape.                            |
| 0267  | [cell](#rune-0267)                  | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0268  | [checksum](#rune-0268)              | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0269  | [chunk](#rune-0269)                 | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0270  | [column {Data}](#rune-0270)         | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0271  | [composite value](#rune-0271)       | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0272  | [config](#rune-0272)                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0273  | [constant pool](#rune-0273)         | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0274  | [content](#rune-0274)               | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0275  | [context object](#rune-0275)        | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0276  | [cookie](#rune-0276)                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0277  | [corpus](#rune-0277)                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0278  | [counter {Data}](#rune-0278)        | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0279  | [credential {Data}](#rune-0279)     | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0280  | [cursor {Data}](#rune-0280)         | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0281  | [data frame](#rune-0281)            | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0282  | [data point](#rune-0282)            | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0283  | [dataset](#rune-0283)               | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0284  | [datum](#rune-0284)                 | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0285  | [delta](#rune-0285)                 | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0286  | [dense vector](#rune-0286)          | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0287  | [descriptor](#rune-0287)            | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0288  | [dictionary](#rune-0288)            | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0289  | [digest {Data}](#rune-0289)         | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0290  | [document](#rune-0290)              | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0291  | [edge {Data}](#rune-0291)           | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0292  | [element](#rune-0292)               | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0293  | [embedding {Data}](#rune-0293)      | A closeness word; it places meaning into geometry.                                                        |
| 0294  | [entity](#rune-0294)                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0295  | [enum value](#rune-0295)            | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0296  | [envelope](#rune-0296)              | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0297  | [event](#rune-0297)                 | A happening word; something occurred and may now be recorded, reacted to, or replayed.                    |
| 0298  | [event log](#rune-0298)             | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0299  | [fact](#rune-0299)                  | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0300  | [feature](#rune-0300)               | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0301  | [field {Data}](#rune-0301)          | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0302  | [fingerprint](#rune-0302)           | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0303  | [flag](#rune-0303)                  | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0304  | [frame {Data}](#rune-0304)          | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0305  | [handle {Data}](#rune-0305)         | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0306  | [hash {Data}](#rune-0306)           | A condensation word; arbitrary input becomes a fixed fingerprint.                                         |
| 0307  | [hash map](#rune-0307)              | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0308  | [header](#rune-0308)                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0309  | [heap record](#rune-0309)           | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0310  | [index {Data}](#rune-0310)          | A retrieval word; it makes later access faster by storing an alternate path to data.                      |
| 0311  | [index key](#rune-0311)             | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0312  | [item](#rune-0312)                  | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0313  | [iterator](#rune-0313)              | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0314  | [journal](#rune-0314)               | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0315  | [key {Data}](#rune-0315)            | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0316  | [key-value pair](#rune-0316)        | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0317  | [ledger](#rune-0317)                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0318  | [list](#rune-0318)                  | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0319  | [literal value](#rune-0319)         | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0320  | [map {Data}](#rune-0320)            | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0321  | [matrix](#rune-0321)                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0322  | [message](#rune-0322)               | A carrier word; intent or state is wrapped for transport between components.                              |
| 0323  | [metadata](#rune-0323)              | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0324  | [model {Data}](#rune-0324)          | A representative word; a simplified structure stands in for a larger reality.                             |
| 0325  | [multimap](#rune-0325)              | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0326  | [node {Data}](#rune-0326)           | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0327  | [null](#rune-0327)                  | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0328  | [object state](#rune-0328)          | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0329  | [offset](#rune-0329)                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0330  | [page {Data}](#rune-0330)           | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0331  | [pair](#rune-0331)                  | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0332  | [payload](#rune-0332)               | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0333  | [pointer {Data}](#rune-0333)        | A location word; it does not hold the thing, but where the thing may be found.                            |
| 0334  | [pool](#rune-0334)                  | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0335  | [property {Data}](#rune-0335)       | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0336  | [queue element](#rune-0336)         | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0337  | [range](#rune-0337)                 | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0338  | [record {Data}](#rune-0338)         | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0339  | [reference {Data}](#rune-0339)      | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0340  | [relation {Data}](#rune-0340)       | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0341  | [representation](#rune-0341)        | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0342  | [resource](#rune-0342)              | A bounded-thing word; something that must be acquired, used, and released.                                |
| 0343  | [revision {Data}](#rune-0343)       | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0344  | [ring buffer](#rune-0344)           | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0345  | [row {Data}](#rune-0345)            | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0346  | [scalar](#rune-0346)                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0347  | [schema {Data}](#rune-0347)         | The declared shape of stored meaning. Shadow: drift, silent coercion, and backward-incompatible surprise. |
| 0348  | [secret {Data}](#rune-0348)         | A guarded-value word meant to remain hidden except to the few who must know it.                           |
| 0349  | [segment {Data}](#rune-0349)        | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0350  | [sequence](#rune-0350)              | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0351  | [series](#rune-0351)                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0352  | [session](#rune-0352)               | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0353  | [set](#rune-0353)                   | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0354  | [sketch](#rune-0354)                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0355  | [slice](#rune-0355)                 | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0356  | [snapshot](#rune-0356)              | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0357  | [sparse vector](#rune-0357)         | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0358  | [stack item](#rune-0358)            | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0359  | [state](#rune-0359)                 | A condition word; what the system is like right now.                                                      |
| 0360  | [stream item](#rune-0360)           | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0361  | [string](#rune-0361)                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0362  | [struct {Data}](#rune-0362)         | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                |
| 0363  | [table {Data}](#rune-0363)          | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0364  | [tensor](#rune-0364)                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0365  | [token {Data}](#rune-0365)          | A countable unit of text or symbol used for parsing, modeling, or encoding.                               |
| 0366  | [tree node](#rune-0366)             | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0367  | [trie](#rune-0367)                  | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |
| 0368  | [tuple {Data}](#rune-0368)          | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                         |
| 0369  | [vector](#rune-0369)                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0370  | [view {Data}](#rune-0370)           | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                         |
| 0371  | [window](#rune-0371)                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                   |

## Entries

### [0250] address {#rune-0250}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0251] aggregate state {#rune-0251}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0252] array {#rune-0252}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

**Pocket gloss:** A contiguous ordered collection accessed by position.

### [0253] bag {#rune-0253}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0254] binary blob {#rune-0254}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0255] bit {#rune-0255}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0256] bitmap {#rune-0256}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0257] blob {#rune-0257}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0258] block {Data} {#rune-0258}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0259] Bloom filter {#rune-0259}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0260] body {#rune-0260}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0261] book-keeping field {#rune-0261}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0262] bucket {Data} {#rune-0262}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0263] buffer {#rune-0263}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

**Pocket gloss:** A temporary holding area used to smooth movement, parsing, or I/O.

### [0264] byte {#rune-0264}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0265] cache entry {#rune-0265}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0266] canonical form {Data} {#rune-0266}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A normalization word; many possible surfaces are forced into one agreed shape.

### [0267] cell {#rune-0267}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0268] checksum {#rune-0268}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

**Pocket gloss:** A compact fingerprint used to detect accidental change.

### [0269] chunk {#rune-0269}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0270] column {Data} {#rune-0270}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0271] composite value {#rune-0271}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0272] config {#rune-0272}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

**Pocket gloss:** Declared settings that shape behavior without editing code.

### [0273] constant pool {#rune-0273}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0274] content {#rune-0274}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0275] context object {#rune-0275}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0276] cookie {#rune-0276}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0277] corpus {#rune-0277}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0278] counter {Data} {#rune-0278}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0279] credential {Data} {#rune-0279}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0280] cursor {Data} {#rune-0280}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

**Pocket gloss:** A movable pointer into a sequence or result set.

### [0281] data frame {#rune-0281}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0282] data point {#rune-0282}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0283] dataset {#rune-0283}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0284] datum {#rune-0284}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0285] delta {#rune-0285}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0286] dense vector {#rune-0286}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0287] descriptor {#rune-0287}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0288] dictionary {#rune-0288}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

**Pocket gloss:** Keyed lookup structure for named values.

### [0289] digest {Data} {#rune-0289}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0290] document {#rune-0290}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0291] edge {Data} {#rune-0291}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0292] element {#rune-0292}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0293] embedding {Data} {#rune-0293}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A closeness word; it places meaning into geometry.

### [0294] entity {#rune-0294}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

**Pocket gloss:** A thing with stable identity that the system cares about.

### [0295] enum value {#rune-0295}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0296] envelope {#rune-0296}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0297] event {#rune-0297}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A happening word; something occurred and may now be recorded, reacted to, or replayed.

**Pocket gloss:** A record of something that happened.

### [0298] event log {#rune-0298}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

**Pocket gloss:** History stored as events instead of overwritten final state.

### [0299] fact {#rune-0299}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0300] feature {#rune-0300}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0301] field {Data} {#rune-0301}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0302] fingerprint {#rune-0302}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0303] flag {#rune-0303}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0304] frame {Data} {#rune-0304}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0305] handle {Data} {#rune-0305}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0306] hash {Data} {#rune-0306}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A condensation word; arbitrary input becomes a fixed fingerprint.

**Pocket gloss:** A condensed fingerprint used for lookup, bucketing, or integrity checks.

### [0307] hash map {#rune-0307}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0308] header {#rune-0308}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0309] heap record {#rune-0309}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0310] index {Data} {#rune-0310}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A retrieval word; it makes later access faster by storing an alternate path to data.

**Pocket gloss:** An access structure that trades space and write cost for faster reads.

### [0311] index key {#rune-0311}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0312] item {#rune-0312}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0313] iterator {#rune-0313}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0314] journal {#rune-0314}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0315] key {Data} {#rune-0315}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

**Pocket gloss:** The field by which something is found or grouped.

### [0316] key-value pair {#rune-0316}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0317] ledger {#rune-0317}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0318] list {#rune-0318}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0319] literal value {#rune-0319}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0320] map {Data} {#rune-0320}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

**Pocket gloss:** Associative collection from keys to values.

### [0321] matrix {#rune-0321}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0322] message {#rune-0322}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A carrier word; intent or state is wrapped for transport between components.

**Pocket gloss:** A discrete packet of meaning sent between parts.

### [0323] metadata {#rune-0323}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0324] model {Data} {#rune-0324}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representative word; a simplified structure stands in for a larger reality.

### [0325] multimap {#rune-0325}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0326] node {Data} {#rune-0326}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0327] null {#rune-0327}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0328] object state {#rune-0328}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0329] offset {#rune-0329}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0330] page {Data} {#rune-0330}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0331] pair {#rune-0331}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0332] payload {#rune-0332}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0333] pointer {Data} {#rune-0333}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A location word; it does not hold the thing, but where the thing may be found.

### [0334] pool {#rune-0334}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0335] property {Data} {#rune-0335}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0336] queue element {#rune-0336}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0337] range {#rune-0337}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0338] record {Data} {#rune-0338}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

**Pocket gloss:** A row-like bundle of named fields describing one thing.

### [0339] reference {Data} {#rune-0339}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0340] relation {Data} {#rune-0340}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0341] representation {#rune-0341}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0342] resource {#rune-0342}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A bounded-thing word; something that must be acquired, used, and released.

### [0343] revision {Data} {#rune-0343}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0344] ring buffer {#rune-0344}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0345] row {Data} {#rune-0345}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0346] scalar {#rune-0346}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0347] schema {Data} {#rune-0347}

**Status:** canonical (major canon, pocket canon)

**Force:** The declared shape of stored meaning.

**Shadow:** drift, silent coercion, and backward-incompatible surprise.

**Pocket gloss:** The declared shape of stored meaning.

### [0348] secret {Data} {#rune-0348}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A guarded-value word meant to remain hidden except to the few who must know it.

### [0349] segment {Data} {#rune-0349}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0350] sequence {#rune-0350}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0351] series {#rune-0351}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0352] session {#rune-0352}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0353] set {#rune-0353}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0354] sketch {#rune-0354}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0355] slice {#rune-0355}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0356] snapshot {#rune-0356}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

**Pocket gloss:** A captured view of state at one moment.

### [0357] sparse vector {#rune-0357}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0358] stack item {#rune-0358}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0359] state {#rune-0359}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A condition word; what the system is like right now.

**Pocket gloss:** The currently true condition of a thing that can change over time.

### [0360] stream item {#rune-0360}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0361] string {#rune-0361}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0362] struct {Data} {#rune-0362}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.

### [0363] table {Data} {#rune-0363}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0364] tensor {#rune-0364}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0365] token {Data} {#rune-0365}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A countable unit of text or symbol used for parsing, modeling, or encoding.

### [0366] tree node {#rune-0366}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0367] trie {#rune-0367}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.

### [0368] tuple {Data} {#rune-0368}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.

### [0369] vector {#rune-0369}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0370] view {Data} {#rune-0370}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.

### [0371] window {#rune-0371}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.
